subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! The Guide declareth: In this Day all are commanded to behold with their own eyes, to hear and to see [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی هادی میفرماید الیوم کل مامورند که ببصر خود مشاهده نمایند بشنیدن و دیدن
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
